reviews.comment:
Mucha cola 20 Minutos ademas Serviclub funciona solo con chip no toma x banda magnetica gaste 4.380 no pude cargar mis puntos. voy a cargar otro lado a partir de ahora

(Translated by Google)
Long queue, 20 minutes. Plus, Serviclub only accepts chip cards, not magnetic stripe cards. I spent 4,380 pesos and couldn't add any points. I'll be adding points somewhere else from now on.
